arts.ttl: “I love Spain” – Everton player wants La Liga move, feels he can take next step
arts.sum: Everton goalkeeper João Virgínia has expressed his desire to make a switch to La Liga at some point in the future. Estadio Deportivo cover comments made by the 25-year-old on his current situation with the Toffees, about his future and the possibility of moving to Spain. Everton signed Virgínia initially for their academy in 2018 The post “I love Spain” – Everton player wants La Liga move, feels he can take next step appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Report: Premier League club named as favourites for Nico Williams
arts.sum: Arsenal are in a prime position to secure the signing of Athletic Club winger Nico Williams, with personal terms and wages reportedly not posing any obstacles for the Gunners. arts.ttl: Why Real Madrid had scouts at Spain vs Netherlands
